show bridge funding as pending until destination confirmation before payment
map deposit and withdrawal status to source and destination evidence
label route as external and show provider/contracts/slippage/finality/refund
deep-link source transaction, source block, destination transaction and receipt

truthRules: source acceptance is not source finality
provider webhook is not destination availability
destination release is not destination confirmation
operator reconciliation is not independent proof
